privileged_info_summary: The appliance failure dataset contains 47 dishwasher run logs (not 45 or 46 as claimed) spanning March 15 to April 30, 2024. The data is synthetic, generated via bash script in setup_task.sh. It includes 6 columns: Date (in 4 inconsistent formats), Cycle Type, Load Size, Water Temperature, Drainage Success, and Notes. The overall failure rate is 29.8% (14 failures out of 47 runs). By failure analysis: Heavy cycles show 92.9% failure rate vs. Normal (4.5%) and Quick (0%); Full loads show 84.6% failure rate vs. Medium (15.8%) and Light (0%); Hot water shows 92.9% failure rate vs. Warm (5.3%) and Cold (0%). The highest-risk condition is the Heavy+Full+Hot combination which exhibits 92.9% failure rate (13 of 14 such runs failed).
